task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Calc is open displaying 'bathroom_renovation.ods' with the 12 renovation tasks.
A new column or cells added to the spreadsheet that validate task dependencies or check prerequisites.
A new column showing the calculated earliest start time (in days) for the tasks.
A new column, labels, or specific formatting indicating which tasks are on the critical path.
A flag, warning message, or formula output explicitly identifying a sequencing violation (specifically that Task 8 'Paint walls' is scheduled before Task 7 'Install ventilation fan').
A cell calculating or displaying the total timeline/duration of the entire renovation project.

integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LibreOffice Calc application interface being used to edit the spreadsheet, rather than terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: No external scripts used to bypass GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show Python scripts or other command-line tools being used to directly modify the .ods file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The spreadsheet 'bathroom_renovation.ods' contains 12 renovation tasks. The agent must update the project plan in LibreOffice Calc. Key requirements to look for: 1) Prerequisite checks/dependency validation. 2) Earliest start times calculated for tasks. 3) Critical path identification (at least 8 tasks marked). 4) A sequencing violation flag (specifically, Task 8 'Paint walls' is incorrectly scheduled before its prerequisite Task 7 'Install ventilation fan'). 5) Total project duration calculation. The agent must use LibreOffice Calc.
